description: Separate zstd-22 streams per data type + transpose (current best)
zstd dictionary for weight stream (32KB dict overhead)
Split int6/int8 weights into separate streams
LZMA for weight stream, zstd for scales/passthrough
LZMA extreme preset for all streams (current best)
LZMA with FILTER_DELTA for weight stream
Byte shuffle fp16 scales (8 bytes diff, not worth it)
Group same tensor types across layers
Decompose abs into abs==1 mask + abs>1 values (current best, -10.7%)
Tested: ternary, zstd-for-mask, per-group, sorted — all worse or negligible
